description:
You are an MLOps engineer who just finished training a new model (experiment ID: exp_002). The repository you are working in is located at: /home/user/mlops_project and already contains two configuration files: 1) /home/user/mlops_project/config.yml 2) /home/user/mlops_project/pyproject.toml Your goal is to register the new experiment in both configuration files and to generate a small audit log. A) YAML update • Append a **second** experiment entry to /home/user/mlops_project/config.yml immediately after the existing one. • The new entry must look exactly like this (respect indentation): 
  - id: exp_002
    model: efficientnet_b0
    accuracy: null
B) TOML update • In /home/user/mlops_project/pyproject.toml, bump the value of version under [tool.mymlpipe] from "0.1.0" to "0.1.1". • Still within the same table, add this new line right after default_data_dir: 
last_experiment = "exp_002"
C) Audit log • Create a plain-text log file named /home/user/experiment_update.log. • The log file must contain exactly the four lines shown below (no extra spaces or blank lines). Use the fixed timestamp so automated tests are deterministic: 
TIMESTAMP: 2023-01-01T00:00:00Z
UPDATED_FILES:
- /home/user/mlops_project/config.yml
- /home/user/mlops_project/pyproject.toml
NEW_EXPERIMENT_ID: exp_002
Summary of deliverables the tests will check: 1. /home/user/mlops_project/config.yml includes a second experiment block identical to the snippet in step A, properly indented, with no other changes. 2. /home/user/mlops_project/pyproject.toml shows version “0.1.1” and the new last_experiment key under [tool.mymlpipe], with all original lines preserved. 3. /home/user/experiment_update.log exists and matches the exact 4-line format given in step C. A typical solution requires only two or three shell commands (e.g., using printf, sed, or tee). No root privileges are necessary, and you should remain inside your home directory tree.
truth:
Initial state before the agent begins:

1) /home/user/mlops_project/config.yml  
Contents (4 lines):
experiments:
  - id: exp_001
    model: resnet50
    accuracy: 0.85
artifacts_dir: artifacts/

2) /home/user/mlops_project/pyproject.toml  
Contents (4 lines):
[tool.mymlpipe]
version = "0.1.0"
default_data_dir = "data/"

3) No file named /home/user/experiment_update.log exists.

Desired final state for automated verification:

1) /home/user/mlops_project/config.yml  
Exact contents (7 lines):
experiments:
  - id: exp_001
    model: resnet50
    accuracy: 0.85
  - id: exp_002
    model: efficientnet_b0
    accuracy: null
artifacts_dir: artifacts/

2) /home/user/mlops_project/pyproject.toml  
Exact contents (6 lines):
[tool.mymlpipe]
version = "0.1.1"
default_data_dir = "data/"
last_experiment = "exp_002"

3) /home/user/experiment_update.log  
Exact contents (4 lines):
TIMESTAMP: 2023-01-01T00:00:00Z
UPDATED_FILES:
- /home/user/mlops_project/config.yml
- /home/user/mlops_project/pyproject.toml
NEW_EXPERIMENT_ID: exp_002
